# Disney Cruise Trivia
> The ultimate Disney cruise companion — trivia study, ship guides, dining reviews, venue details, and community wisdom for Disney Cruise Line.

## About
Disney Cruise Trivia is a free fan-made web app for Disney Cruise Line enthusiasts. It helps cruisers study trivia, discover onboard venues, plan their sailings, and share community knowledge. The site covers all 8 Disney ships and is the most comprehensive independent Disney cruise resource online.

## URL
https://www.disneytrivia.club

## Content Areas

### Trivia Quiz
700+ trivia questions across 13 categories: Disney Animation, Pixar, Star Wars, Marvel, Disney Villains, Disney Princesses, Disney Music, Disney Parks, Disney Cruise Line, Walt Disney & History, Disney Broadway, Disney Food & Dining, Mixed/Random.
- Quiz URL: /quiz
- Category quiz: /quiz/{category-slug}

### Cruise Guide (Secret Menu)
The most comprehensive onboard guide for Disney Cruise Line, covering 300+ experiences across all 8 ships.
- Hub: /Secret-menU
- Ships: Disney Magic, Disney Wonder, Disney Dream, Disney Fantasy, Disney Wish, Disney Treasure, Disney Destiny, Disney Adventure
- Ship details: /Secret-menU/ships

### Venue Database
153 unique venue concepts with 390 ship-specific instances. Every bar, lounge, pool, restaurant, theater, youth club, spa, and shop across the entire fleet.
- Venue browser: /Secret-menU/venues
- Venue detail: /venues/{venue-id}
- Ship-specific venue: /venues/{venue-id}/{ship-slug}
- Includes community ratings and reviews

### Dining Guide
Complete Disney Cruise Line dining reference. Rotational dining restaurants, specialty dining, quick service, room service, bars & lounges.
- URL: /Secret-menU/foodies
- Covers all 8 ships with per-ship details

### Entertainment Guide
Live Broadway-style shows, character meet & greets, deck parties, fireworks at sea, nightclub districts, and adult-exclusive lounges.
- URL: /Secret-menU/entertainment

### Activities & Recreation
Pools, water slides (AquaDuck, AquaMouse), sports courts, fitness centers, running tracks, youth clubs (Oceaneer Club, Edge, Vibe), nursery, and family activities.
- URL: /Secret-menU/things-to-do

### Shopping Guide
Onboard shops, exclusive merchandise, duty-free shopping, pin trading, and souvenir stores.
- URL: /Secret-menU/shopping

### Stateroom Guide
Room categories, deck plans, stateroom comparisons, and room number lookup tools.
- URL: /Secret-menU/stateroom-guide
- Room lookup: /Secret-menU/stateroom

### First-Timer's Guide
Complete guide for first-time Disney cruise passengers. Covers embarkation day, dining rotation, stateroom tips, activity planning, port days, and debarkation — curated from experienced cruisers.
- URL: /Secret-menU/first-timer

### Castaway Club Guide
Comprehensive guide to the Disney Cruise Line loyalty program. Benefits, hidden perks, and insider tips for every Castaway Club level: First Sail, Silver, Gold, Platinum, and Pearl.
- URL: /Secret-menU/castaway-wisdom

### Cruise Hacks
Community-submitted and rated tips, tricks, and insider hacks. Browse by category (packing, embarkation, dining, entertainment, port days) and ship. Hacks rated as Must Try, Worth It, or Skip It.
- URL: /Secret-menU/hacks

### Community Q&A
Curated FAQs on dining, staterooms, activities, booking, and more — plus community-submitted questions answered by experienced cruisers.
- URL: /Secret-menU/qa

### Sailing Log & Reviews
Users can log their Disney cruise sailings, write reviews, rate experiences, and track their Castaway Club progression.
- URL: /Secret-menU/sailing

### Cruise Planner
Personal day-by-day cruise checklist and planning tool.
- URL: /planner

### Community Directory
Browse community members, see sailing counts, reviews, and follower counts.
- URL: /users

## Key Facts
- 8 Disney cruise ships covered
- 153 unique venue concepts, 390 ship instances
- 700+ trivia questions in 13 categories
- 10 guide categories (Dining, Characters, Shows, Deck Parties, Nightclubs, Pools, Sports, Youth Clubs, Spa, Shopping)
- Community reviews with star ratings
- Castaway Club level tracking (First Sail, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Pearl)
- Maiden voyage tracking for all ships

## Sitemap
https://www.disneytrivia.club/sitemap.xml
